page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz. The instance features 128 physical cores with a single thread per core, delivering a total of 128 dedicated vCPUs. It is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and runs on a KVM hypervisor.

This instance is configured with 30717 GB of local SSD storage, making it highly suitable for data-intensive operations that require massive local capacity. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating rapid data transfer across cloud environments. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high density of local SSD storage paired with 1024.0 GB of RAM, the ecs.i4.32xlarge offers a resource-dense profile for large-scale databases, big data analytics, and high-throughput transactional workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention, making it a cost-efficient choice for enterprise-grade storage-heavy applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.32xlarge is an x86_64 server instance powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B processors operating at 2.7 GHz. It features 128 physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 128 dedicated vCPUs alongside 1024.0 GB of system memory. A key characteristic of this instance is its substantial local storage capacity, consisting of 30717 GB of SSD storage, complemented by a 100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, the instance does not include GPU resources. The combination of high-capacity local SSD storage, dedicated processing cores, and a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes this instance highly suitable for large-scale database deployments, big data processing, and high-throughput storage-intensive enterprise workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.32xlarge is a KVM-based server featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, 30717 GB of local SSD storage, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth for storage-heavy workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i4.32xlarge features 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 30717 GB local SSD storage on a 100 Gbps network.
tagline: A high-capacity storage and database instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, one terabyte of RAM, and thirty terabytes of local SSD.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz
1024.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
30717 GB of high-capacity local SSD storage
Optimized for large-scale databases and big data analytics
